title: Roleplay food Sptites
description: Tasty looking, completely non-vanilla styled 80+ food sprites!
body:
# This RP was made for RP!!!
...and for customization for food, because original textures looks **annoying**

**Optifine required!**!

## What does it do?

![rename process](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73f74ead308ebc091e02d698282a5e4aa94bd71.gif)

This resource pack changes the texture of food when renamed at an anvil. Renaming options are listed below


# Renames list

### Apple=

![apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a78cf722014d875206f83493f1dad19a7020e0af.jpeg)

red

red_slice

blue

blue_slice

green_slice

### Bread=

![Bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7149a7911123b1fbd19d9b43f9c01f3a6228cb4e.jpeg)

khachapuri

alternatekhachapuri

hamburger

sandwitch

anothersandwitch

croissant 

hotdog

toast

cookedtoast

alternatetoast

khachacopter

### Baked potato=

![potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c356551dfe3384acde59646a7013cdc362dfa35.jpeg)

chips

bag

bag_marked

fries

### Buns with meat=

![buns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0c0a6a2ab6466300d7ebdeb21d4687ce11142f.jpeg)

Cooked Salmon = salmonbun

Steak = steakbun

Porkchop = porkbun

Cooked cod = fishburger

### Carrot:

![carrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4333bae6b265bec1752558298a9332a57b52598.jpeg)

coolsoos

carrot_stick

carrot_sticks

### Cookie=

![cookie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ce2207bac7f227199498f2b797811bb6471f59.jpeg)

gingerbreadman

christmastree

muffin

chocomuffin

muffinsmol

chocomuffinsmol

oatcookie

hearty (wip) 

oreo

similar

### Cooked chicken=

![chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56d87fadacfdf44f6aeef5d28d61baf3a5f28d4c.jpeg)

leganim

bucket

### FISH:

![fisher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dce48e792f830cf9667659698bc049e8760bfd4.jpeg)

suit (for cooked salmon)

codsuit (for cooked cod)

god (for cooked cod)


### Golden Apple=

![gaple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99fe2bad2cdb91ac01dd04b22dc95eb6dede58d0.jpeg)

metal

metal_slice

golden_slice

### Golden carrot=

![goldcarrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae18da76349446a2d17bafa31326ea21a7902302.jpeg)

cheesy

pizza

goldcarrot_sticks

goldcarrot_stick


### Milk bucket= 

![milk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/211f2b7b527c834ae8fceb9b64db44cff54c28a4.jpeg)

choco

milk

There is one cool-looking but illogical sweet berries texture - "juice"


I will update this rp every time i come up with new food ideas, so check this page every couple of weeks!
